center.name: 古斯塔夫·哈特勞布
center.summary: 古斯塔夫·哈特勞布是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联20种鸟类，包括Eastern crested guinea fowl、蓝胸鹑、Southern crested guinea fowl等20种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The yellow tufted pipit or African rock pipit (Anthus crenatus) is a small-sized, passerine bird that is native to South Africa and Lesotho

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The akun eagle-owl (Ketupa leucosticta) is a species of owl in the family Strigidae and is native to the African tropical rainforest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The barred becard (Pachyramphus versicolor) is a small passerine bird in the family Tityridae, the tityras, becards, and allies. It is found in Costa Rica, Panama, and in South America from Venezuela to Bolivia.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The eastern crested guinea fowl (Guttera pucherani) is a species of guinea fowl native to East Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Monteiro's hornbill (Tockus monteiri) is a species of hornbill that is native to the dry woodlands of southwestern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: VIII) (7837800794), Zosterops ficedulinus.jpg | status = EN | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Zosterops | species = ficedulinus | authority = Hartlaub, 1866 | synonyms = | range_map = Zosterops ficedulinus, range map.png | range_map_caption = }} The Príncipe white-eye (Zosterops ficedulinus) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-winged grey warbler (Drymocichla incana) is a small to medium size bird in the family Cisticolidae that is native to Central Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The smoky-fronted tody-flycatcher (Poecilotriccus fumifrons) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Brazil, French Guiana, Suriname, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The southern crested guinea fowl (Guttera edouardi) is a species of guinea fowl native to sub-Saharan Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: semifasciatus, Ghana | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Lophoceros | species = semifasciatus | authority = (Hartlaub, 1855) | range_map = | range_map_caption = | synonyms = }} The West African pied hornbill (Lophoceros semifasciatus) is a bird of the hornbill family, a family of tropical near-passerine birds found in the Old World. The West African pied hornbill is found in West Africa, from south Nigeria to Senegal and Gambia—primarily in secondary forest areas of the Guinean-Congolese forest, and is threatened by forest fragmentation. It was previously considered conspecific with the Congo pied hornbill, and was split in IOC 13.2. It is a frugivore.{{Cite journal |last1=Chaves |first1=Patrícia P

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The rufous-collared thrush (Turdus rufitorques) is a species of bird in the family Turdidae, the thrushes and allies. It is found in El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, and Mexico.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The chestnut-breasted nigrita (Nigrita bicolor) is a common species of estrildid finch found in Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-faced crimsonwing (Cryptospiza reichenovii) is a common species of estrildid finch found in Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The green-backed twinspot or green twinspot (Mandingoa nitidula) is an estrildid finch found in many parts of Sub-Saharan Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: lepidus (Hartlaub, 1879): Found in New Guinea and the Bismarck Archipelago * S

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The brown twinspot (Clytospiza monteiri) is a common species of estrildid finch found in sub-Saharan Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The brown firefinch (Lagonosticta nitidula) is a common species of estrildid finch found in Southern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-chested swallow (Hirundo lucida) is a small non-migratory passerine bird found in West Africa, the Congo Basin and Ethiopia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The African river martin (Pseudochelidon eurystomina) is a passerine bird, one of two members of the river martin subfamily of the swallow family, Hirundinidae

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-crowned waxbill (Estrilda nonnula) is a common species of estrildid finch found in western-central Africa
